# requestEnableTethering()

**Instance Method**

Enables tethered capture if the camera has the capability to take pictures while connected.

## Declaration

```swift
func requestEnableTethering()
```

## Discussion

To confirm whether a camera can take pictures while connected, check whether its [doc://com.apple.imagecapturecore/documentation/ImageCaptureCore/ICDevice/capabilities] include [doc://com.apple.imagecapturecore/documentation/ImageCaptureCore/ICDeviceCapability/cameraDeviceCanTakePicture].

## Taking Pictures

- **tetheredCaptureEnabled**: A Boolean value indicating whether tethered capture is enabled on the camera.
- **ptpEventHandler**: A closure for handling PTP event packets.
- **requestTakePicture()**: Captures a new image using the camera.
- **requestSendPTPCommand(_:outData:sendCommandDelegate:didSendCommand:contextInfo:)**: Sends a Picture Transfer Protocol (PTP) command to a camera asynchronously.
- **requestSendPTPCommand(_:outData:completion:)**: Sends a Picture Transfer Protocol (PTP) command to a camera asynchronously.
- **requestDisableTethering()**: Disables tethered capture on the camera.
